data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. STORMY ROSE turned spotting a big start finishing seventh (22.69) last time in a Mix 5 at this track. Worth another chance. 2. TIME PASSAGES is better than last start when fifth (22.53) from Box 2 at this track over 380m. Has a solid record from this box including two wins and a minor placing. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 3. STAPPEN ON TAP produced a modest effort most recently when eighth at this track over 380m behind Verruckt (22.65) in a Grade 4. A big run wouldn’t surprise. 7. HIDDEN FURY was out of the money at this circuit last start but can make amends.","runners":[1,2,3,7],"exclusive":false}
